settings.heading: Count Every Rakaat with Confidence
settings.text: A discreet electronic prayer companion that helps you stay present by keeping track of rakaats during salah.

settings.heading: Designed for focused salah
settings.text: The Rakaat Counter is a standalone prayer aid — no smartphone, no notifications, no distractions.

settings.heading: Place the device
settings.text: Position the Rakaat Counter near your prayer space before starting salah.

settings.heading: Begin your prayer
settings.text: Pray naturally without holding a device or touching a counter.

settings.heading: Review your count
settings.text: The display helps you keep track of sujood and rakaat progress, so you can stay focused.

settings.heading: Sensor-Based Counting
settings.text: Designed to detect prayer movement during sujood without requiring manual clicking or phone interaction.

settings.heading: Quiet and Discreet
settings.text: No beeps, no app distractions, and no need to interrupt your prayer rhythm.

settings.heading: Built for Peace of Mind
settings.text: Helps reduce uncertainty when you lose track of rakaats, especially during longer or voluntary prayers.

settings.heading: Designed to Support Focused Worship
settings.text: The Rakaat Counter is designed to help track prayer progress while you remain focused on salah. Its sensor-based design detects prayer movement discreetly and quietly, reducing the chance of losing count during longer prayers.
